case_title: 2697 MISSION STREET, LLC VS. JOSEPH JIMENEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (ENDORSED RETURNDED IN SASE)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF 2697 MISSION STREET, LLC SERVED SEP-04-2019, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE

PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
